title: Working Over Water – Fall Protection and Rescue Plans
description: Reviewed WAC 296-874 requirements for work over water. Covered ring buoy placement and spacing requirements on marine barge and bridge deck over Duwamish. Demonstrated Don-and-Doff of Type III PFD for barge deck workers. Reviewed man-overboard drill procedure. Covered hypothermia risk in Puget Sound temperatures and emergency contact list.
notes: All marine barge and pylon crew attended. Man-overboard drill conducted after talk – response time 4 minutes – acceptable. Updated emergency contact list posted at barge wheelhouse and east and west pylon work platforms.

title: Cable Stay Stressing Operations – Safety and Quality
description: Covered the stressing sequence for stay cables per contract specifications. Reviewed exclusion zone requirements during hydraulic jack operations. Discussed over-stress risk and calibration requirements for jack. Covered communication protocols between stressing crew and tower crew. Reviewed OSHA high tension wire snap-back hazards.
notes: Cable stay crew and pylon workers attended. Exclusion zones re-marked at base of tower and cable anchor locations after talk. Stressing log requirements reviewed with foreman.

title: Struck-By Hazards in Active Traffic Zones
description: Reviewed Washington State WAC 296-155-305 traffic control requirements. Covered proper setup and teardown of temporary traffic control devices. Discussed spotter responsibilities for delivery trucks entering work zone. Reviewed proper positioning to avoid struck-by during concrete truck approach and backup.
notes: All Ballard Bridge workers attended following vehicle backing incident on 01-05. Immediate corrective action reinforced. SDOT traffic control inspector observed talk and provided compliance confirmation letter.

title: Crane Safety and Rigging Inspection
description: Covered ASME B30.5 pre-shift inspection requirements for all crane types on site. Demonstrated rigging hardware inspection – wire rope
attendees_count: and hooks. Reviewed load chart usage for Liebherr LTM 1500. Discussed critical lift plan requirements for picks over 75% of rated capacity.
column11: and signal persons on West Seattle project attended. Three workers identified who had not completed rigging certification refresher – enrolled in next class. Rigging tag-out system reinstated.
